title: 都市修仙：外卖小哥的逆袭

episodes.title: 第1集

shots.shot_type: 第一人称视角/大范围延时
shots.veo_prompt_standard: Vertical 9:16 POV shot from a speeding electric scooter handle bars. Weaving dangerously through gridlocked traffic at sunset. Speed lines, motion blur. In the side mirror, a young delivery rider Chen Fan (24yo, blue uniform, buzz cut) gritting teeth, veins popping on forehead. High octane energy, cinematic lighting.
shots.veo_prompt_reference: POV scooter riding, heavy traffic, sunset, Chen Fan reflection in mirror, intense focus.
shots.veo_prompt_frames: Camera accelerates through narrow gap between two buses, horizon tilts aggressively.
shots.visual_description_standard: 电动车如针般穿过车流 → 倒影显示汗水滴入眼睛 → 指关节因用力握把而发白
shots.visual_description_reference: 电动车如针般穿过车流 → 倒影显示汗水滴入眼睛 → 指关节因用力握把而发白
shots.visual_description_frames: 电动车如针般穿过车流 → 倒影显示汗水滴入眼睛 → 指关节因用力握把而发白

image_prompts.first_frame: vertical 9:16, POV between cars, motion blur, sunset
image_prompts.last_frame: vertical 9:16, POV tilting, mirror showing Chen Fan's gritty expression

shots.veo_prompt: Vertical 9:16 POV shot from a speeding electric scooter handle bars. Weaving dangerously through gridlocked traffic at sunset. Speed lines, motion blur. shots.visual_description: 电动车如针般穿过车流 → 倒影显示汗水滴入眼睛 → 指关节因用力握把而发白

dialogue.speaker: 陈凡

shots.veo_prompt_standard: Vertical 9:16 Extreme close-up on Chen Fan's eyes. Reflection of a countdown timer turning RED in his pupil. Sweat beads roll down temple. Background is a streaking blur of city lights. High contrast, anxiety inducing.
shots.veo_prompt_reference: Chen Fan eyes extreme close up, red digital numbers reflected in eye, sweat, blurred background.
shots.veo_prompt_frames: Camera shakes with road vibration, focus locked on the panic in eyes.
shots.visual_description_standard: 瞳孔放大 → 红光在瞳孔中反射 → 下颚死死咬紧

image_prompts.first_frame: vertical 9:16, eyes looking forward, sweat drop falling
image_prompts.last_frame: vertical 9:16, eyes widening, red light reflection intensifies

dialogue.speaker: 陈凡

shots.veo_prompt_standard: Vertical 9:16 Low angle shot from the asphalt up. A red supercar drifts around a corner, tires smoking, heading straight for the camera. In the foreground, a child's dropped teddy bear lies on the crosswalk. Sense of impending impact.
shots.veo_prompt_reference: Red supercar drifting towards camera, low angle, teddy bear in foreground on asphalt.
shots.veo_prompt_frames: Car looms larger rapidly, shadow engulfs the frame.
shots.visual_description_standard: 汽车疯狂漂移 → 烟雾吞没背景 → 阴影覆盖泰迪熊

shots.veo_prompt_standard: Vertical 9:16 Slow motion. Chen Fan (blue uniform) is mid-air, body horizontal, diving between the car and a blurred small figure (the girl). His scooter crashes into a wall in the background. Debris floats in the air. Face twisted in exertion.
shots.veo_prompt_reference: Chen Fan mid-air dive, slow motion, blue uniform, scooter crashing background, debris floating.
shots.veo_prompt_frames: Character floats through frame, time frozen, hand reaching out.
shots.visual_description_standard: 陈凡水平冲入画面 → 玻璃碎片悬浮在空中 → 手伸向撞击点

shots.veo_prompt_standard: Vertical 9:16 Macro shot. Chen Fan's wrist slams onto the car hood. The jade pendant shatters. A drop of blood mixes with the green dust. Golden runes ignite from the blood mixture, spiraling up his arm. Magical realism.
shots.veo_prompt_reference: Wrist hitting car hood, jade shattering, blood mixing, golden runes appearing on skin.
shots.veo_prompt_frames: Impact causes dust shockwave, runes glow and travel up arm.
shots.visual_description_standard: 玉佩炸裂 → 血液接触粉尘 → 金色脉络爬上皮肤
shots.visual_description_reference: 玉佩炸裂 → 血液接触粉尘 → 金色脉络爬上皮肤
shots.visual_description_frames: 玉佩炸裂 → 血液接触粉尘 → 金色脉络爬上皮肤

dialogue.speaker: 远古之声
dialogue.audio_note: 尖锐的耳鸣声转变为低沉的雷鸣
dialogue.audio_note_en: High-pitched ringing morphing into a deep thunder rumble

shots.veo_prompt_standard: Vertical 9:16 Dolly zoom (Vertigo effect) on Chen Fan's face. His buzz cut hair blows back from an invisible energy source. Eyes snap open - irises are molten gold. The panic is gone, replaced by terrifying calmness. Atmosphere shifts from warm sunset to cold blue.
shots.veo_prompt_reference: Chen Fan face dolly zoom, eyes opening gold, hair blowing back, color grade shift to cold.
shots.veo_prompt_frames: Background compresses while face remains constant, lighting shifts drastically.
shots.visual_description_standard: 猛然抬头 → 双眼金光爆射 → 背景扭曲 → 表情变得冷酷
shots.visual_description_reference: 猛然抬头 → 双眼金光爆射 → 背景扭曲 → 表情变得冷酷

dialogue.speaker: 远古之声
dialogue.tone: 如释重负的叹息，充满力量

shots.veo_prompt_standard: Vertical 9:16 Wide shot. The red supercar is crumpled like an accordion against Chen Fan's single hand. The car's rear wheels are suspended in the air. Chen Fan stands perfectly still, feet embedded in cracked asphalt. Steam rises from the car. Cinematic composition.
shots.veo_prompt_reference: Chen Fan stopping car with one hand, car wrecked, rear wheels up, ground cracked, steam rising.
shots.veo_prompt_frames: Static shot with drifting smoke and spinning car wheels.
shots.visual_description_standard: 汽车尾部在空中弹跳 → 引擎嘶嘶喷出蒸汽 → 陈凡纹丝不动

shots.veo_prompt_standard: Vertical 9:16 Low angle medium shot looking up at Chen Fan. He slowly withdraws his hand, dusting off his blue uniform. He looks down at the driver with the indifference of a god looking at an ant. Golden glow in eyes fades but sharpness remains.
shots.veo_prompt_reference: Chen Fan low angle, dusting off uniform, looking down with indifference, sharp eyes.
shots.veo_prompt_frames: Hand swipes dust off shoulder, head tilts down slowly.
shots.visual_description_standard: 手弹去肩上的灰尘 → 下巴微收 → 眼睛微微眯起

dialogue.audio_note: 清晰、干脆的声音穿透耳鸣

shots.veo_prompt_standard: Vertical 9:16 Handheld shaky cam. The Rich Second Gen (20s, flashy suit) kicks the jammed door open. He stumbles out, face red, veins popping. He ignores the miracle of his survival and stares at the scratches. Hysterical anger.
shots.veo_prompt_reference: Rich kid kicking car door, stumbling out, angry face, pointing at car scratches.
shots.veo_prompt_frames: Door forces open, character lunges towards camera/car.
shots.visual_description_standard: 车门被踹开 → 富二代摔出来 → 踢轮胎 → 手指颤抖地指着
shots.visual_description_reference: 车门被踹开 → 富二代摔出来 → 踢轮胎 → 手指颤抖地指着
shots.visual_description_frames: 车门被踹开 → 富二代摔出来 → 踢轮胎 → 手指颤抖地指着

image_prompts.character: vertical 9:16, rich young man, expensive suit, disheveled, furious expression, spitting while talking
image_prompts.last_frame: vertical 9:16, rich kid screaming face close up

shots.veo_prompt: Vertical 9:16 Handheld shaky cam. The Rich Second Gen (20s, flashy suit) kicks the jammed door open. He stumbles out, face red, veins popping. He ignores the miracle of his survival and stares at the scratches. Hysterical anger.
shots.visual_description: 车门被踹开 → 富二代摔出来 → 踢轮胎 → 手指颤抖地指着

dialogue.speaker: 富二代
dialogue.lines: 你瞎啊？！老子的限量版法拉利！
dialogue.lines_en: Are you blind?! My limited edition Ferrari!
dialogue.audio_note: 剧烈咳嗽，歇斯底里的尖叫

shots.veo_prompt_standard: Vertical 9:16 OTS shot from behind the screaming Rich Kid. Chen Fan stands composed, hands behind his back, blue uniform fluttering in the wind. The contrast between the frantic rich kid and the statue-like Chen Fan is stark.
shots.veo_prompt_reference: OTS rich kid pointing at Chen Fan, Chen Fan standing calm hands behind back, wind blowing uniform.
shots.veo_prompt_frames: Rich kid gesticulates wildly, Chen Fan remains perfectly still.
shots.visual_description_standard: 富二代挥舞手臂 → 陈凡如雕像般站立 → 风只吹动陈凡的衣角
shots.visual_description_reference: 富二代挥舞手臂 → 陈凡如雕像般站立 → 风只吹动陈凡的衣角
shots.visual_description_frames: 富二代挥舞手臂 → 陈凡如雕像般站立 → 风只吹动陈凡的衣角

shots.visual_description: 富二代挥舞手臂 → 陈凡如雕像般站立 → 风只吹动陈凡的衣角

dialogue.speaker: 富二代
dialogue.lines: 你个送外卖的烂命，赔得起这车一个螺丝吗！
dialogue.lines_en: A delivery rat's life isn't worth a single screw on this car!

shots.veo_prompt_standard: Vertical 9:16 POV from Chen Fan. The world turns grey/monochrome. A thick, black, skull-shaped mist (Death Qi) coils tightly around the Rich Kid's neck and forehead. The mist pulses like a heartbeat. Supernatural horror vibe.
shots.veo_prompt_reference: POV monochrome world, black skull mist around rich kid's neck, pulsating mist.
shots.visual_description_standard: 世界褪色成灰白 → 黑烟在富二代头上形成骷髅 → 烟雾如绞索般收紧

shots.veo_prompt_standard: Vertical 9:16 Close-up. Chen Fan tilts his head slightly. The golden glow is gone, but his pupils are vertical slits for a split second. He smiles—a cold, terrifying smile that doesn't reach his eyes.
shots.veo_prompt_reference: Chen Fan close up, head tilt, vertical pupils momentary, cold smile.
shots.veo_prompt_frames: Slow push in on the smile.

dialogue.speaker: 陈凡
dialogue.lines: 午夜十二点，记得给自己买口棺材。
dialogue.lines_en: Midnight. Don't forget to buy a coffin.

shots.veo_prompt_standard: Vertical 9:16 Medium shot. The Rich Kid freezes mid-shout. His face drains of color instantly. He steps back, tripping over his own feet, terrified by an invisible pressure. He clutches his chest.
shots.veo_prompt_reference: Rich kid freezing, face pale, stepping back, tripping, clutching chest, terrified.
shots.veo_prompt_frames: Character stumbles backward, hand trembling as it raises to defend.
shots.visual_description_standard: 嘴巴张大僵住 → 皮肤变白 → 踉跄后退 → 双手颤抖

shots.veo_prompt_standard: Vertical 9:16 Tracking shot. The god-like aura vanishes instantly. Chen Fan's face contorts into comic horror. He grabs his delivery box and sprints away from the camera at impossible speed, leaving a trail of dust. The rich kid is left confused in the foreground.
shots.veo_prompt_reference: Chen Fan sprinting away panic, holding box, dust trail, rich kid confused foreground.
shots.veo_prompt_frames: Camera pans rapidly to follow the runner, leaving the scene behind.
shots.visual_description_standard: 陈凡抱头 → 猛然转身 → 狂奔向远方 → 富二代眨眼困惑

dialogue.speaker: 陈凡
dialogue.lines: 我的五十块！等等，别投诉啊！！
dialogue.lines_en: My 50 Yuan! Wait, don't file the complaint!!
dialogue.audio_note: 卡通风格的极速溜走音效
dialogue.audio_note_en: Wile E. Coyote style zip-away sound

episodes.name: 1集_创意导入
episodes.content: 陈凡在送餐途中遭遇车祸，危急时刻体内灵气觉醒，救下路人。他发现自己能看到普通人看不到的灵气流动。

characters.name: 陈凡
characters.role: 外卖小哥，隐藏修仙者，性格沉稳但关键时刻霸气外露
characters.description: 陈凡，24岁，蓝色外卖服（有灵气纹路），寸头，眼神锐利，右手腕有神秘玉佩，腰间挂着古剑（伪装成雨伞）
characters.appearance: 蓝色外卖服（有灵气纹路），寸头，眼神锐利，右手腕有神秘玉佩，腰间挂着古剑（伪装成雨伞）

living_characteristics.physical_presence: 蓝色外卖服（有灵气纹路），寸头，眼神锐利，右手腕有神秘玉佩，腰间挂着古剑（伪装成雨伞）

scenes.storyBeatCn: 黄金3秒钩子：电动车极速穿梭车流，展示底层挣扎与极致紧迫
scenes.storyBeatEn: Golden 3s Hook: Weaving through traffic at high speed, showing struggle and extreme urgency

dialogues.speaker: 陈凡
dialogues.linesCn: 让开！都让开！！最后这单要是超时，我妈的医药费就断了！
dialogues.linesEn: Move! Everybody move!! If this order is late, my mom's medical bills are gone!
dialogues.toneCn: 声嘶力竭，混杂着风声与喇叭声
dialogues.toneEn: Hoarse screaming, mixed with wind and honking

scenes.storyBeatCn: 激发事件：失控超跑冲向斑马线上的小女孩，路人吓傻
scenes.storyBeatEn: Inciting Incident: Out-of-control supercar rushes at little girl on crosswalk, bystanders frozen

dialogues.speaker: 小女孩
dialogues.toneCn: 无声的恐惧，只有刺耳的刹车声

scenes.storyBeatCn: 第一次转折：撞击瞬间，祖传玉佩饮血碎裂，万年记忆瞬回
scenes.storyBeatEn: First Twist: Moment of impact, heirloom jade drinks blood and shatters, 10,000 years of memory returns

dialogues.speaker: 古老旁白/心声
dialogues.linesCn: （混响）本尊历劫万载，今日……归位！
dialogues.linesEn: (Reverb) I have suffered for ten thousand years, today... I return!
dialogues.toneCn: 威严，洪钟大吕，震慑灵魂

scenes.storyBeatCn: 大高潮：陈凡单手按住疾驰跑车车头，车身折叠，地面崩裂
scenes.storyBeatEn: Climax: Chen Fan stops the speeding car with one hand, hood crumples, ground cracks

dialogues.speaker: 音效
dialogues.linesCn: （钢铁扭曲的刺耳爆鸣，地面塌陷声）
dialogues.linesEn: (Ear-piercing sound of twisting steel, ground collapsing)
dialogues.toneCn: 极具冲击力的物理音效

dialogues.speaker: 陈凡
dialogues.toneCn: 低沉霸气，如神谕般不可违抗
dialogues.toneEn: Deep and domineering, undeniable like a divine decree

scenes.storyBeatCn: 反派登场：富二代狼狈爬出，不顾女孩死活，只心疼车
scenes.storyBeatEn: Villain Entry: Rich kid crawls out, ignores the girl, only cares about the car

dialogues.speaker: 富二代
dialogues.linesCn: 妈的！我的限量版法拉利！臭送外卖的，你这条烂命赔得起吗？！
dialogues.linesEn: Damn it! My limited edition Ferrari! You stinking delivery rat, is your rotten life enough to pay for this?!

scenes.storyBeatCn: 核心设定：陈凡眼中世界变色，看到富二代头顶的死气
scenes.storyBeatEn: Core Setting: World changes color in Chen Fan's eyes, seeing death aura over rich kid

dialogues.speaker: 陈凡
dialogues.linesCn: 聒噪。印堂死气缭绕，你活不过今晚三更。
dialogues.linesEn: Noisy. Death aura surrounds your forehead, you won't live past midnight.
dialogues.toneCn: 冷漠，仿佛在看一只将死的虫子
dialogues.toneEn: Indifferent, like looking at a dying bug

scenes.storyBeatCn: 情绪反应：富二代被陈凡的气势吓退半步，周围人目瞪口呆
scenes.storyBeatEn: Reaction: Rich kid steps back in fear of Chen Fan's aura, crowd stunned

dialogues.speaker: 富二代
dialogues.toneCn: 色厉内荏，莫名感到恐惧
dialogues.toneEn: Cowardly but trying to look tough, inexplicably terrified

scenes.storyBeatCn: 强反转结尾：仙尊气场瞬间崩塌，变回因为超时而崩溃的打工人
scenes.storyBeatEn: Strong Twist Ending: Immortal aura collapses instantly, reverting to worker crashing over late delivery

dialogues.speaker: 手机提示音
dialogues.linesCn: “订单已超时，扣款50元，差评警告。”
dialogues.linesEn: "Order overdue. 50 RMB deducted. Negative review warning."

dialogues.speaker: 陈凡
dialogues.linesCn: 卧槽！我的全勤奖！老板，这真不怪我啊！！
dialogues.linesEn: Holy sh*t! My attendance bonus! Boss, this really isn't my fault!!
dialogues.toneCn: 瞬间破防，捡起外卖箱狂奔，留下风中凌乱的众人
dialogues.toneEn: Instantly losing cool, grabbing delivery box and sprinting, leaving crowd confused

拥堵的城市街道.name: 拥堵的城市街道
拥堵的城市街道.description: 日落时分的繁忙都市街道，车流如织，光影斑驳。充满紧迫感。
拥堵的城市街道.description_en: Busy urban street at sunset, heavy traffic, dappled light and shadow. High urgency atmosphere.
拥堵的城市街道.reference_prompt: cinematic street view, busy Chinese city at sunset, gridlocked traffic, golden hour lighting, asphalt road, urban skyscrapers in background, motion blur, 8k, photorealistic.

车祸撞击点.name: 车祸撞击点
车祸撞击点.description: 街道的一角，柏油路面龟裂，有明显的刹车痕迹和散落的碎片。
车祸撞击点.description_en: A corner of the street, cracked asphalt, visible skid marks and scattered debris.
车祸撞击点.reference_prompt: cinematic low angle shot of cracked asphalt road, skid marks, debris floating in air, smoke and steam rising, dramatic destruction aftermath, hyper-realistic texture, 8k.

电动车.name: 电动车
电动车.description: 陈凡的送餐工具，旧款，带有外卖箱。
电动车.description_en: Chen Fan's delivery vehicle, worn out, equipped with a delivery box.
电动车.reference_prompt: close up of an electric scooter handle bars, worn texture, delivery box attached, motion blur background, realistic vehicle details.

红色超跑.name: 红色超跑
红色超跑.description: 法拉利风格的红色跑车，先是漂移，后车头严重损毁，像手风琴一样皱起。
红色超跑.description_en: Ferrari-style red sports car. First drifting, then severely damaged front, crumpled like an accordion.
红色超跑.reference_prompt: luxury red supercar, aggressive design. Variation: crumpled front hood, metal twisted, steam rising from engine, realistic car crash damage, cinematic lighting.

玉佩.name: 玉佩
玉佩.description: 古老的绿色玉佩，碎裂瞬间爆发出金色符文。
玉佩.description_en: Ancient green jade pendant, exploding into golden runes at the moment of shattering.
玉佩.reference_prompt: macro shot of a green jade pendant shattering, glowing golden magical runes emerging from the cracks, mixture of blood and jade dust, magical realism style, 8k.

泰迪熊.name: 泰迪熊
泰迪熊.description: 掉落在斑马线上的儿童玩具，象征无辜与危险。
泰迪熊.description_en: A child's toy dropped on the crosswalk, symbolizing innocence and danger.
泰迪熊.reference_prompt: close up of a lonely teddy bear lying on asphalt crosswalk, shadow of a car looming over it, dramatic lighting, emotional focus.

智能手机.name: 智能手机
智能手机.description: 屏幕碎裂的手机，显示扣款通知。
智能手机.description_en: Smartphone with a cracked screen, displaying a penalty notification.
智能手机.reference_prompt: close up of a cracked smartphone screen lying on the ground, bright red notification banner with text 'ORDER FAILED', digital glare, realistic glass texture.
